events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: hot work in progress, combustibles within radius uncovered. This is a fire hazard. NFPA 51B requires combustibles within 35 ft radius to be moved or protected, fire watch, hot work permit, etc. OSHA 1926 Subpart J covers welding/cutting. Combustibles uncovered within radius is non-compliant and dangerous. Decision: fail. Risk: high or critical. I'll say critical given active hot work with exposed combustibles. Component conditions: non-compliant. Findings and actions accordingly.

    "Inspect area for hidden combustibles, floor openings, and penetrations before restart"
